title: EVALACT: Evaluate-as-Action for Retrieval-Augmented Agents

defines.name: EVALACT
defines.definition: A reinforcement learning framework that turns retrieval quality assessment into an explicit Evaluate action paired with each Search step to produce trajectory-aligned process signals.

defines.name: Process-Calibrated Advantage Rescaling (PCAR)
defines.definition: A GRPO-based optimization strategy that rescales advantages at the segment level using self-evaluation scores to improve credit assignment in long retrieval trajectories.

problem: Retrieval-augmented agents still struggle with reliable intermediate reasoning because noisy retrieval can derail multi-step trajectories and outcome-only reinforcement learning gives overly coarse credit signals.
